name: PC PLUG RTX 5070 + i5 14400F Gaming PC
description: High-end 1440p/4K gaming rig built around the 10-core Intel i5-14400F and a 12GB RTX 5070. Paired with 16GB DDR4 3200MHz RAM, a 1TB Netac NVMe SSD, B760 motherboard, AIGO ICE400 cooler, 650W 80+ PSU and a tempered-glass case with ARGB fans. Includes genuine Windows 11, 1-year warranty and free delivery.

name: PC PLUG RTX 5060 + i5 14400F Gaming PC
description: Smooth 1080p/1440p gaming build pairing the Intel i5-14400F with an 8GB RTX 5060. Includes 16GB DDR4 3200MHz RAM, a 1TB Netac NVMe SSD, H610M motherboard, AIGO ICE400 cooler and a 650W 80+ PSU. Genuine Windows 11, 1-year warranty and free delivery included.

name: PC PLUG RTX 5060 + i5 12400F Gaming PC
description: Excellent price-to-performance gaming PC pairing the 6-core i5-12400F with an 8GB RTX 5060. Comes with 16GB DDR4 3200MHz RAM, a 1TB Netac NVMe SSD, H610M motherboard, AIGO ICE400 cooler and a 650W 80+ PSU. Windows 11, 1-year warranty and free delivery included.

name: PC PLUG RTX 3050 + i5 12400F Gaming PC
description: Budget-friendly 1080p gaming PC built around the i5-12400F and an 8GB RTX 3050. Includes 16GB DDR4 3200MHz RAM, a 1TB Netac NVMe SSD, H610M motherboard, AIGO ICE400 cooler and a 650W 80+ PSU. Windows 11, 1-year warranty and free delivery included.

name: PC PLUG RTX 3050 + i5 12400F Gaming PC Bundle
description: The same reliable i5-12400F + 8GB RTX 3050 build at a limited-time bundle price. 16GB DDR4 3200MHz RAM, 1TB Netac NVMe SSD, H610M motherboard, AIGO ICE400 cooler, 650W 80+ PSU. Windows Pro activated, 1-year warranty and free delivery included.

name: PC PLUG RTX 5060 + i5 12400F Gaming PC Bundle (Monitor + Keyboard + Mouse)
description: Complete gaming setup bundle: an i5-12400F + 8GB RTX 5060 PC with 16GB DDR4 3200MHz RAM, a 1TB NVMe SSD and H610M motherboard, plus a Twisted Minds 24" 144Hz gaming monitor and an RGB keyboard/mouse combo. Windows Pro activated, 1-year warranty and free delivery included.

name: Twisted Minds TM24FHD1441PS 24" 144Hz Gaming Monitor
description: 24-inch Full HD IPS gaming monitor with a 144Hz refresh rate and 1ms response time. NVIDIA G-Sync and AMD FreeSync compatible with HDMI 2.1 connectivity, built for fast, tear-free competitive gaming.

name: DarkFlash DG240 ARGB AIO Liquid Cooler
description: 240mm all-in-one liquid CPU cooler with dual ARGB fans and a clean white finish. Keeps high-performance CPUs cool and quiet while adding customizable RGB lighting to any build.

name: Fantech MK875V2 Atom 81 RGB Mechanical Gaming Keyboard (Navy Blue)
description: Compact 65% mechanical gaming keyboard with hot-swappable 3-pin red switches and per-key RGB across 17 lighting modes. A durable navy blue colorway gives it a distinct look without sacrificing performance.
